key_insight: TorchNEP makes NEP training over 100× faster while improving prediction quality, with most accuracy gains coming from a two-stage training protocol.
engineering_relevance: It enables faster, more practical development of machine-learned interatomic potentials for large-scale atomistic simulations in materials discovery.
method: PyTorch-based NEP implementation with analytically derived gradients
Adaptive optimization plus a two-stage training strategy
Maintains compatibility with existing NEP models
evidence_signal: Across multiple benchmark datasets and elemental/alloy systems, TorchNEP improved force and stress predictions while maintaining comparable or better energy accuracy and materials-property predictions.
watch_item: Higher model complexity did not necessarily improve predictive performance, so lower training error should not be assumed to mean a better potential.
paper_title: TorchNEP: Ultra-Efficient and Accurate Training of Neuroevolution Potentials
